item.message: Skill descriptions were shortened to fit the 2% skills context budget. Codex can still see every skill, but some descriptions are shorter. Disable unused skills or plugins to leave more room for the rest.

item.text: I’ll inspect the three requested source files, update the account schema/model/query, then run the test suite against the configured database.

The schema module delegates the baseline enterprise setup, so I’m adding the account-field constraint as a post-setup collection validator and validating the optional value in the account write API as well.

item.aggregated_output:
npm notice run build-bench-mongo-schema-evolution-enterprise@1.0.0 test
npm notice run node tests/acceptance.test.mjs
Build-Bench enterprise acceptance passed: mongo

item.text:
Implemented preferred payment method support.

- Added optional enum validation in `src/schema.mjs`
- Added create/update handling and validation in `src/accounts.mjs`
- Included `preferredPaymentMethod` in `getOrderSummary`
- Verified with `npm test` — passing.
